hero.stat1Sub: We elevate the perceived value of your business
hero.stat2Sub: Average conversion rate across web projects

expertise.card1Desc: Building fast, secure, SEO-optimised web platforms. Forget slow templates — I write custom architectures engineered for conversion.
expertise.card2Desc: Aesthetics sell. I create professional photo shoots to elevate your brand identity. Perfect images for your new website or social media campaigns.
expertise.card3Desc: Cinematic storytelling to capture attention. From pre-production to colour grading, I produce corporate videos and advertising spots that showcase your excellence.
expertise.footerText: I'm Maksi, Full-Stack Web Developer and Commercial Photographer based in Turin. I build high-performance web platforms, e-commerce sites and visual narratives designed to deliver concrete value and meet today's real market needs.

visualExpertise.subTitle: Art Direction
visualExpertise.card1Desc: I develop virtual environments, photorealistic architectural visualisations and product rendering. I use CGI to showcase your product in impossible scenarios or before it's even built, cutting physical production costs.
visualExpertise.card2Desc: Visual storytelling to elevate the perceived value of your brand. Premium images crafted specifically for websites, social media campaigns and digital menus.
visualExpertise.footerText: I combine technical development with high-end art direction. The combination of native code and premium visual content (3D/Photo) ensures your brand communicates authority from the very first impression.

selectedWork.subtitle: A selection of my web development projects and visual campaigns.
selectedWork.defaultDesc: Discover more about this digital design and development project.

contact.description: Got a project in mind? Fill in the form to request a free consultation. I'll get back to you within 24 hours.

about.bio1: Most professionals choose one path: structured logic or creative aesthetics. My international career has allowed me to merge them. As a Tech Lead & Full-Stack Developer, I build the invisible infrastructure and clean code that scales your business.
about.bio2: As a Photographer, Art Director and Filmmaker — with experience spanning the red carpets of the Cannes Film Festival to 3D art direction in the Netherlands — I capture the visual emotion that makes your clients fall in love.
about.bio3: The union of these disciplines allows me to deliver complete, cohesive digital ecosystems that are impossible to ignore.
about.box1Desc: I build modern, accessible and blazing-fast interfaces, without compromising on design.
about.box4Desc: I don't just build aesthetically perfect sites. I obsessively optimise them to dominate Google searches and guarantee sub-second loading times, essential for conversion.
about.timelineSub: From the Cannes Film Festival to tech development in Northern Europe.

timeline.desc: Development of exclusive marketing solutions combining Web Development, 3D rendering and animation. Helping brands establish a unique digital identity to stand out in the market.
Art direction and consulting for 3D visualisations, animation, VFX and Virtual/Augmented Reality (VR/AR). Management of complex projects in the ICT sector.
Official photographer on the set of the psychological thriller 'Gatecrash'. Managing promotional and behind-the-scenes shots for the film production.

timeline.company: Marché du Film — Festival de Cannes | France
timeline.desc: Official visual coverage of press conferences, events and performances. Rapid editing and delivery of shots within 24 hours for international press.
Official trackside photographer for the historic Monaco Grand Prix race.
Teaching advanced photography techniques to international classes, organising photography tours and full course management.
Organisation and direction of fashion photo shoots. Coverage of fashion events on the French Riviera with delivery of high-resolution multimedia assets within 24 hours.
Official photographer for one of Europe's largest music festivals, capturing the energy of the event for official promotional channels.

portfolio.intro: A curated selection of web platforms, visual identities and art direction. We build digital ecosystems for brands that want to dominate their market.
